headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 14, 2026**
article:
The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit performance, including a home run and 2 RBIs. The Washington Nationals fell to a historic 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, with JJ Bleday leading the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 6 runs. The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, including Chase Dollander, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right elbow strain with the Colorado Rockies. Other players on the injured list include Cal Raleigh (Seattle Mariners), Jimmy Herget (Colorado Rockies), Brooks Kriske (Athletics), Robby Snelling (Miami Marlins), Francisco Alvarez (New York Mets), Rhett Lowder (Cincinnati Reds), and Drew Pomeranz (Los Angeles Angels).

The Baltimore Orioles have made a move to strengthen their pitching staff, acquiring RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. The Athletics also traded LHP José Suarez to the Seattle Mariners for cash. Additionally, the Arizona Diamondbacks acquired OF Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for CF Alek Thomas, and the San Francisco Giants traded C Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates. Ryan O'Hearn led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit performance, including a home run and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Historic Loss to Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals fell to a 15-1 defeat at the hands of the Cincinnati Reds, marking a lopsided victory for the home team. JJ Bleday led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 6 runs.

top_news.title: **Mets Take Down Tigers 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts. Gage Workman led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Rout Marlins 9-1**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins dominated the Miami Marlins, winning 9-1 behind a strong outing from Zebby Matthews. Matthews pitched 7.0 innings, striking out 5 and allowing 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Rockies RHP Chase Dollander Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Colorado Rockies right-handed pitcher Chase Dollander has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right elbow strain.

top_news.title: **Orioles Acquire Eduarniel Núñez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles have acquired RHP Eduarniel Núñez from the Athletics in exchange for cash. This move adds depth to the Orioles' pitching staff.
